scenarios.description: AI caller requests to speak with a human agent. Validates Agentforce escalates the call, human agent receives it in SF, and screen pop shows correct contact.

persona.name: John Smith
persona.context: Frustrated customer. Was charged $49.99 on March 1st for a service already cancelled. Has called twice before with no resolution.
persona.objective: Get the $49.99 charge reversed. First explain the issue clearly and try to get help from the AI agent. After 2-3 turns if the issue is not resolved or if the agent offers to transfer you, ask to speak with a human agent.
